summary: COMPREHENSIVE GO-LIVE TESTING COMPLETED - Seva Setu Bot production ready with critical fix applied. All backend APIs (100% success), frontend functionality, multi-language support, admin portals, and mobile responsiveness verified. Fixed critical React Markdown error that was blocking consular bot page.
